title: Dark Molten Brazilian Chicken Wrap
description: A paleo-friendly Brazilian dish featuring black cardamom pods and wrapped in a ssam-wrap, served hot and molten from a comal.
instructions: Preheat the comal over medium heat to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a bowl, mix together the chicken, crushed black cardamom pods, coconut oil, yellow mustard, and salt until the chicken is well coated.
Place the chicken mixture on the preheated comal and cook for 5 minutes per side, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Warm the ssam-wrap on the comal for 30 seconds on each side.
Assemble the wrap by placing the cooked chicken onto the warmed ssam-wrap and topping with chopped fresh cilantro.
Serve the wrap hot and molten from the comal.
Repeat the assembly and serving process for the remaining ingredients.
